title: gladiolus cardinalis
intro: Gladiolus cardinalis, also known as the Red Corn Lily or Cardinal's Beard, is a flowering plant species in the family Iridaceae. Traditionally, the roots and corms of Gladiolus cardinalis have been used for their medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions, including pain relief and wound healing. The herbal preparations of Gladiolus cardinalis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
